full_text:
Zhou Qun (Zhongzhi) 周群 (仲直)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Qun (周群), styledZhongzhi (仲直), was born in Ba. Notably predicted the Han’s fall, Liu Biao’s death and Liu Bei’s successful expedition into Hanzhong. Zhou Qun was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom.
